description.part1: Welcome to the Doctorina, a test version of our innovative artificial intelligence health information assistant. Please read these Terms and Conditions carefully before using the Doctorina. By accessing or using this service, you agree to be bound by the terms outlined below.
The Doctorina is currently in a testing phase and is not fully developed or ready for public use. As such, it may contain bugs, inaccuracies, or incomplete information.
description.part2: Important: The Doctorina is not a substitute for professional medical advice, diagnosis, or treatment. It is provided for testing purposes only and should not be relied upon for any medical decision-making or in emergency situations.

description.part1: The Doctorina does not provide medical advice, and no part of the information provided by the Doctorina should be construed as medical advice, diagnosis, or treatment.
description.part2: Always seek the advice of your physician or another qualified healthcare provider with any questions you may have regarding a medical condition or treatment.

description.part1: You understand and agree that the developers and operators of the Doctorina are not liable for any damages, losses, or injuries that may arise from the use of this test version.
description.part2: We disclaim all warranties, express or implied, including but not limited to the implied warranties of merchantability, fitness for a particular purpose, and non-infringement.

description.part1: Your use of the Doctorina is voluntary and at your own risk. By using this service, you acknowledge that it is an experimental tool still under development.
description.part2: You agree not to rely on any information provided by the Doctorina for making healthcare decisions or in emergency situations.

description.part1: The Doctorina may collect and store information from your interactions with the service, including but not limited to your queries, responses, and usage patterns.
description.part2: This information is used solely for the purpose of improving the Doctorina's performance and functionality.

description.part1: We reserve the right to modify or terminate the Doctorina at any time without prior notice.
description.part2: We will make reasonable efforts to notify users of any significant changes or discontinuation of the service.

description.part1: These Terms and Conditions are governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of common sense, without regard to its conflict of law principles.
description.part2: If any provision of these Terms and Conditions is found to be invalid or unenforceable, the remaining provisions will continue to be valid and enforceable.

description.part1: If you have any questions or concerns about these Terms and Conditions, please contact us at avs@doctorina.com.
